title: 28 Cal Arc Ergos Intec Helmet
shortDescription: Electrically insulated helmet with integrated retractable visor & chin protection. Provides safety against thermal hazards of an electric arc & projected droplets of molten metal. Electrical insulation 1000V AC & 1500V DC
